sample_manifests.reason: Layer 1 primitive substrate should stay cargo-checkable before production promotion.
Receipt/provenance substrate is central to release confidence.
Nexus is the cross-domain connection substrate and should have direct compile evidence.
Security substrate should stay cargo-checkable before production promotion.
Resource governance is central to boundedness and release confidence.
Conduit is the internal delivery substrate and should have direct compile evidence.
Gateway/conduit security enforcement should stay cargo-checkable.
